title: Father and Uncle of Slain New York Girl Given Life Sentences in Pakistan
summary_full: The killing of the victim, a 14-year-old girl from Yonkers who was known for posting videos on TikTok, was premeditated, a court ruled.
summary_public: The killing of the victim, a 14-year-old girl from Yonkers who was known for posting videos on TikTok, was premeditated, a court ruled.
